hazards.description: Wrong PID delivered to LIN network due to parity bit computation error
hazards.consequence: Slave nodes interpret wrong frame; incorrect actuator action
hazards.mitigation: REQ-LIN-001, REQ-LIN-002: protect_id verified by unit tests with golden vectors

hazards.description: Corrupted checksum accepted as valid frame
hazards.consequence: Invalid data processed by safety function
hazards.mitigation: REQ-LIN-003 through REQ-LIN-006: checksum algorithm verified by unit tests

hazards.description: Diagnostic frame (0x3C/0x3D) with enhanced checksum accepted
hazards.consequence: Incorrect diagnostic response; potential misconfiguration of slave node
hazards.mitigation: REQ-LIN-009: validate_frame enforces ClassicChecksum for diagnostic IDs

hazards.description: Frame data longer than 8 bytes sent on bus
hazards.consequence: Bus protocol violation; undefined slave node behaviour
Undefined behaviour on LIN network; potential bus conflict

hazards.description: NoResponse not propagated to application caller
hazards.consequence: Application assumes successful communication; stale state used
hazards.mitigation: REQ-LIN-014, REQ-LIN-021: NoResponse returned and maps to relay::Error::Timeout
